title: Housing.com International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Housing.com International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Housing.com International Enterprises family as a Full Stack Developer in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Housing.com International Enterprises:
Housing.com International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com International Enterprises!
